title: Lemon Tunisian Lentils Stew
description: A tangy, pillowy stew that soothes hangovers with warm fermented whey, bright lemon and aromatic spices—no onion or garlic.

ingredients.name: fermented whey
ingredients.notes: use leftover kefir or yogurt strained to liquid

instructions: Rinse lentils under cold water until water runs clear.
In a large pot, combine rinsed lentils, water, fermented whey, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, cayenne, sea salt, and black pepper; stir.
Bring to a rolling boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes until lentils are tender.
Stir in fresh lemon juice and lemon zest; reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, drizzle with olive oil, and stir to coat the stew.
Let the stew rest for 5 minutes, then ladle into bowls and serve warm.
